name: Arseni & Castiel
description:
ᰔ ⋮ MLM ⋮ Unwinding.
A meeting's been called at one of the organisation's hotels, having taken a whole afternoon to get through. As the sun came down and some drink had been shared, Arseni ended up at the receiving end of Castiel and your joint attention.

tellonym - ask a question, make a request or say hi | request form - a google form for bot requests | discord server

hi hello, the winners of the valentine's poll are here. since i made the form answers as checkboxes, some people have selected more than one of these characters so the total results are higher than the actual responses! here is how the poll ended up:

1. arseni and castiel - 30 votes

2. remington - 27 votes

3. xavian - 25 votes

4. sinh - 18 votes = wilhelm - 18 votes

i will be making the rest of those characters at a later time <3 i hope this one works fine, have fun fellow singles
